title: md-sitemap page twin frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter for Markdown page twins (Markdown Sitemap & Page Twin Protocol).

canonical.description: Absolute URL of the human HTML page this twin represents.

title.description: Short human title for the page.

lang.description: BCP 47 language tag, e.g. sk, cs, en.

updated.description: ISO 8601 date of last twin update.

schemaVersion.description: md-sitemap spec version this twin was written against, e.g. 0.1.
